original_description: Access and retrieve laws, regulations, rules, and treaties from three Chinese legal databases. Use when the user needs to search, browse, download, or extract Chinese legal documents from the National Laws and Regulations Database (flk.npc.gov.cn), the State Council Rules Database (gov.cn), or the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Treaty Database (treaty.mfa.gov.cn). Covers searching by title/content, filtering by status/category, pagination, sorting, batch download, single document download, and article-level keyword extraction. Supports multi-environment browser automation (Kimi native, Claude Code via kimi-bridge, Codex).
best_description: Access and retrieve laws, regulations, rules, and treaties from three Chinese legal databases. Use when the user needs to search, browse, download, or extract Chinese legal documents from the National Laws and Regulations Database (flk.npc.gov.cn), the State Council Rules Database (gov.cn), or the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Treaty Database (treaty.mfa.gov.cn). Covers searching by title/content, filtering by status/category, pagination, sorting, batch download, single document download, and article-level keyword extraction. Supports multi-environment browser automation (Kimi native, Claude Code via kimi-bridge, Codex).
final_description: Activate when the user wants to search, retrieve, download, or export from any official PRC legal database: 国家法律法规数据库 (flk.npc.gov.cn), 国家规章库 (gov.cn), or 外交部条约库 (treaty.mfa.gov.cn). Signals include database names/URLs/shorthands paired with requests to find laws by title or keyword, check effective status (现行有效/已废止/尚未生效), locate articles containing specific terms, filter or sort results, batch download, or export metadata to CSV/JSON. Not for drafting, translation, legal analysis, or general China law questions.

history.description: Access and retrieve laws, regulations, rules, and treaties from three Chinese legal databases. Use when the user needs to search, browse, download, or extract Chinese legal documents from the National Laws and Regulations Database (flk.npc.gov.cn), the State Council Rules Database (gov.cn), or the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Treaty Database (treaty.mfa.gov.cn). Covers searching by title/content, filtering by status/category, pagination, sorting, batch download, single document download, and article-level keyword extraction. Supports multi-environment browser automation (Kimi native, Claude Code via kimi-bridge, Codex).

train_results.query: 外交部条约数据库里有没有中国签署的关于海洋环境保护的多边条约？帮我搜一下，按签署年份排一下
我老板让我去国家规章库（gov.cn那个）搜一下关于食品安全的部门规章，需要导出一个元数据列表，格式最好是csv或者json
flk上搜违约金，返回了好几百个结果，我想在这些法律的正文里找含预期违约的具体条款，不是找法律标题
我想批量下载flk.npc.gov.cn上所有关于环境保护的现行法律，大约有几百个，有没有什么高效的方法？
帮我在全国人大法律法规数据库里搜一下《物业管理条例》，确认一下它现在是不是还有效，如果现行有效帮我下载一份DOCX
我需要找所有和出租车运营监管相关的地方性法规，数据库是flk.npc.gov.cn那个，要筛选现行有效的，最好能一次性多捞点
帮我起草一封劳动争议仲裁申请书，申请人张三，理由是公司拖欠三个月工资，格式要正式
帮我整理一下这份数据合规报告的参考文献，需要转成GB/T 7714格式，大概有20条文献
GitHub上有没有爬取中国法律数据库的开源项目？帮我搜一下，我想看看有没有可以直接用的轮子
帮我写个Python脚本，把这份劳动合同JSON数据批量转成Excel，字段有标题、发布日期、文号
帮我把这段中文法规翻译成英文：第三十二条 用人单位解除或者终止劳动合同，应当向劳动者支付经济补偿。
深圳市2025年GDP是多少？经济增长率怎么样，和全国平均水平比较一下

需要一份符合中国法律要求的劳动合同模板，包含试用期、竞业禁止、保密协议条款，帮我起草一份

history.description: Use this skill when the user needs to search, verify the status of, or download Chinese legal documents from any official PRC government database: the NPC Law Database (flk.npc.gov.cn / 国家法律法规数据库), the State Council Rules Repository (gov.cn / 国家规章库), or the MFA Treaty Database (treaty.mfa.gov.cn / 外交部条约库). The user may refer to these by their URL, Chinese name, or abbreviated forms. Covers finding laws by topic or title, checking whether a regulation is still in effect, locating specific articles containing a keyword, batch downloading, and exporting metadata. Not for drafting legal documents, translating laws, or general China queries.

history.description: Use this skill when the user's intent involves the 国家法律法规数据库 (flk.npc.gov.cn), 国家规章库 (gov.cn), or 外交部条约库 (treaty.mfa.gov.cn) — searching, downloading, verifying, or extracting Chinese legal documents from these official PRC sources. NOT for: drafting legal documents, translation, or general China queries.

history.description: Activate when the user wants to search, retrieve, download, or export from any official PRC legal database: 国家法律法规数据库 (flk.npc.gov.cn), 国家规章库 (gov.cn), or 外交部条约库 (treaty.mfa.gov.cn). Signals include database names/URLs/shorthands paired with requests to find laws by title or keyword, check effective status (现行有效/已废止/尚未生效), locate articles containing specific terms, filter or sort results, batch download, or export metadata to CSV/JSON. Not for drafting, translation, legal analysis, or general China law questions.
